examples.name: issue-generation-prosper-chat-db

examples.body:
Required code outputs:
- e2e-apps/prosper-chat/supabase/migrations/20260302101500_7f8d9de2-cb2b-4f35-b3b8-6d8a8f519e7e.sql

examples.name: browser-allow-success-outcome-assertions
examples.title: Node restart-state browser contract
examples.body:
Required code outputs:
- e2e-apps/node-next/app/page.js

Execution root:
- e2e-apps/node-next

app_target: node-next
runtime_profile: web
browser_repro_mode: allow_success

repro_steps:
- goto /game
- expect_any_text Winner: X || Start game
- click button.restart
- expect_text Start game
- expect_text_absent Winner: X
- expect_url /game

artifact_requirements:
- screenshot: artifacts/game-board.png
- console log
- network log

Validation:
- cd e2e-apps/node-next && npm test -- --passWithNoTests
